title: Expression in condition is evaluated twice in lighweight updates
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_lwu (a BIGINT, b VARCHAR(255), c FLOAT DEFAULT 0.0);

INSERT INTO test_lwu SELECT number, CASE WHEN number % 5 = 0 THEN NULL ELSE CAST(number % 5 AS CHAR) END, number / 2.0 FROM (SELECT 0 AS number UNION ALL SELECT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 2 UNION ALL SELECT 3
